## D) RUNTIME ACTIVATION

### ElementsLab Route
- **Route:** `/elements` (ViewType: "elements")
- **Component:** `src/views/ElementsLab.tsx`
- **Registry:** `src/components/ai-elements/registry.ts`

### Proof: All 48 Components Rendered
```typescript
// From registry.ts - 48 entries matching official slugs
AI_ELEMENTS_REGISTRY = [
  { id: "attachments", ... },      // #1
  { id: "chain-of-thought", ... }, // #2
  ...
  { id: "open-in-chat", ... },     // #48
];
```

### Navigation
1. Start dev server: `pnpm dev`
2. Click **"Elements Lab"** in left rail (icon: four squares)
3. Browse 5 categories with all 48 components

## E) CHAT CUTOVER STATE

### Route Map (ShellApp.tsx lines 143-145)
```typescript
chat: ChatViewV2,          // NEW (was chat-v2)
"chat-legacy": ChatViewWrapper,  // OLD (temporary burn-in)
elements: ElementsLab,
```

### Nav Types (nav.types.ts)
```typescript
export type ViewType =
  | "home"
  | "chat"         // Points to ChatViewV2
  | "chat-legacy"  // Points to old chat
  | "elements"
  | ...
```

### Nav Policy (nav.policy.ts)
```typescript
chat: { singleton: false, maxInstances: 20, allowNew: true, ... },
"chat-legacy": { singleton: false, maxInstances: 20, allowNew: true, ... },
```

### Rail Config (rail/rail.config.ts)
```typescript
{ id: 'chat', label: 'Chat', icon: ChatTeardropText, payload: 'chat' },
// chat-v2 REMOVED
```

## F) BUILD GATES (OBJECTIVE OUTPUTS)

### 1. TypeCheck
```
$ pnpm typecheck

> @a2r/platform@1.0.0 typecheck /Users/macbook/Desktop/a2rchitech-workspace/a2rchitech/5-ui/a2r-platform
> tsc --noEmit

✅ Pass (no errors)
```

### 2. Tests
```
$ pnpm test

> @a2r/platform@1.0.0 test /Users/macbook/Desktop/a2rchitech-workspace/a2rchitech/5-ui/a2r-platform
> vitest run

 RUN  v1.6.1 /Users/macbook/Desktop/a2rchitech-workspace/a2rchitech/5-ui/a2r-platform

 ✓ src/lib/sandbox/smart-sandbox.test.ts  (32 tests) 5ms
 ✓ src/lib/ai/rust-stream-adapter.test.ts  (15 tests) 6ms
 ↓ src/lib/ai/rust-stream-adapter.replay.test.ts  (4 tests | 4 skipped)
 ✓ src/lib/ai/text-splitter.test.ts  (4 tests) 4ms
 ✓ src/lib/ai/token-utils.test.ts  (19 tests) 11ms

 Test Files  4 passed | 1 skipped (5)
      Tests  70 passed | 4 skipped (74)
   Duration  686ms
```

### 3. Guard: AI Elements
```
$ pnpm guard:ai-elements

> @a2r/platform@1.0.0 guard:ai-elements
> bash scripts/no-legacy-ai-elements.sh

Checking for legacy ai-elements imports...
✅ OK: No legacy ai-elements imports found
```

### 4. Guard: No Drift
```
$ pnpm guard:no-drift

> @a2r/platform@1.0.0 guard:no-drift
> bash scripts/guard:no-drift.sh

Running drift guard checks...
→ Checking for legacy imports...
→ Checking for deprecated 'tool-invocation' type...
→ Checking for 'as any' in V2 files...
→ Checking for @ts-ignore in V2 files...
→ Checking for @eslint-disable in V2 files...
→ Checking for div-based tool rendering...
→ Verifying Tool component imports...

✅ All drift guard checks passed!
```

### 5. Coverage Gate
```
$ pnpm coverage:ai-elements

> @a2r/platform@1.0.0 coverage:ai-elements
> bash scripts/coverage-ai-elements.sh

==============================================
AI Elements Coverage Gate
==============================================

📋 Official components: 48

✅ PASS: All 48 official components are registered
📊 Registry statistics: 48

✅ All checks passed!
   48 official AI Elements components are present and registered.
==============================================
```
